client_id.description: PayPal REST app client id, used as the HTTP Basic username on the OAuth 2.0 client-credentials token exchange. Never logged.

client_secret.description: PayPal REST app client secret, used as the HTTP Basic password on the OAuth 2.0 client-credentials token exchange. Never logged.

base_url.description: PayPal API base URL. Defaults to the production host; set to https://api-m.sandbox.paypal.com directly for PayPal's sandbox environment (see docs.md Known limits for why is_sandbox is not modeled as a separate toggle).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the transactions reporting stream's start_date query param. Required for every read (the incremental cursor, when present from a prior sync, raises this bound automatically).

end_date.description: RFC3339 upper bound for the transactions reporting stream's end_date query param. Optional; when unset, PayPal's own reporting endpoint default applies (see docs.md Known limits: legacy computed time.Now() client-side, which this bundle cannot reproduce as a declarative default).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
